case_title: PUGH, BARBARA vs. APAU, LILI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUGH, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT APAU, LILI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-04-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-17-1998

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT TO AUG 4, 1998, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUGH, BARBARA
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1998, OFF CALENDAR AUGUST 11, 1998 POS, OSC

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-04-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-14-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), POS, OR TO FILE SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH; OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR NOV-24-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF CHARLES A. BONNER FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND TO CONTINUE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING BY SPECIAL APPEARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUGH, BARBARA

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-24-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OR SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH; OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
